title.en: Understanding Kubernetes and Docker from the Linux Kernel: Pod and Container Creation, Runtime, Syscalls, and Destruction
title.zh: 从 Linux 内核视角理解 Kubernetes 与 Docker：Pod / 容器的创建、运行、系统调用与销毁机制

summary.en: A kernel-level explanation of container creation, runtime behavior, and destruction through Pod lifecycle, CRI, containerd, Docker, runc, Linux syscalls, namespaces, nsproxy, and cgroups.
summary.zh: 从 Pod 生命周期、CRI、containerd、Docker、runc、Linux syscall、namespace、nsproxy 与 cgroup 视角解释容器创建、运行和销毁机制。

readingDirection.en: Read this when studying Kubernetes runtime internals, OCI runtime behavior, namespace and cgroup isolation, or container startup and syscall troubleshooting.
readingDirection.zh: 适合在理解 Kubernetes 容器运行时链路、OCI runtime、namespace/cgroup 隔离机制，或排查容器启动与系统调用行为时阅读。
